summary: SiYuan has a Full-Read SSRF via /api/network/forwardProxy in github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan/kernel
details:
SiYuan has a Full-Read SSRF via /api/network/forwardProxy in github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan/kernel.
